AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY NOVAK, IOSIF AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES, NEIL ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF IOSIF NOVAK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NEIL ANDREW JAMES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WITNESS STATE FARM CLAIMS REPRESENTED BY MICHELE KING. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOVAK, IOSIF IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JAMES, NEIL ANDREW PLAINTIFF FAILED THE RIGHT OF WAY TO DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
